typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[#1C1C1A]
typography.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-[#1C1C1A]
typography.label: text-sm font-semibold tracking-[0.05em] uppercase text-[#5B5B56]

surfaces.header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F9F9F7]/80 border-b border-[#E0DCD1] sticky top-0 z-50
surfaces.cards: bg-[#FFFFFF] border border-[#E0DCD1] rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-sm transition-all hover:shadow-md
surfaces.cards_highlight: bg-[#2C5234] text-white border-none rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-lg

components.button_primary: bg-[#2C5234] text-white px-6 py-3 rounded-full font-medium transition-colors hover:bg-[#1F3A24] inline-flex items-center justify-center
components.button_secondary: bg-transparent text-[#2C5234] border border-[#2C5234] px-6 py-3 rounded-full font-medium transition-colors hover:bg-[#EFECE6] inline-flex items-center justify-center
components.badge: inline-block px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider bg-[#EFECE6] text-[#2C5234]

animations.scroll_reveal: framer-motion fade-in and slide-up (y: 20, opacity: 0 to 1) with 0.5s duration and 0.2s stagger

hero_main.alt: Couple checking their retirement plan over coffee

document_desk.alt: Documents and glasses on a desk

testimonial_1.alt: Portrait of a mature professional man

testimonial_2.alt: Portrait of a confident senior woman

testimonial_3.alt: Portrait of a man in a suit

data_testid_requirement: All interactive elements, buttons, form inputs, and key information blocks must include a role-based, kebab-case data-testid attribute.

sections_instructions.Hero: Split layout. Left: H1, subheadline, primary CTA, trust badge (e.g., '+15,000 accompagnés'). Right: Image offset with soft rounded corners. Background: warm sand (#F9F9F7).
sections_instructions.Problem: Bento Grid layout (Mode A). Focus on the complexity of French retirement system. Use dark text on white cards, heavy padding.
sections_instructions.Solution: Highlight clarity. Use the abstract texture as a soft background or overlay. Introduce 3 steps with connecting lines.
sections_instructions.Simulator: Cardless, dense layout. Use Shadcn forms/sliders for Age, Contribution Years, and Average Income. Dark green button to 'Simuler'.
sections_instructions.Pricing: 3-tier setup. 9€, 29€, 150€. Center tier should pop out using the primary green (#2C5234) and white text. Add Stripe CTAs.
sections_instructions.Social_Proof: Marquee with user testimonials and 5-star ratings.
sections_instructions.Blog: Grid of 13 dummy SEO article cards. Title, date, read time. Hover lift effect.
sections_instructions.Contact_&_Disclaimer: Clean form layout. Footer with dark background (#1C1C1A) for legal text.
